data.title: GreenSlate Expands Again with New Chicago Office, Benefiting Illinois Productions
data.description: GreenSlate has expanded to Chicago to assist Illinois productions in optimizing their incentive funds with advanced technology, top-tier service, and on-the-ground assistance. This move aims to support the entertainment industry in Illinois by providing specialized solutions to maximize financial benefits.

data.title: Celo launches Agent Visa program for AI builders, offering DeFi incentives & access to 14M MiniPay users.
data.description: Celo has rolled out a new Agent Visa program which features tiers and provides liquidity assistance. This program also grants access to 14 million MiniPay users for artificial intelligence agents that demonstrate genuine usefulness on the blockchain.

data.title: rule of three® Unveils 2026 March Healthcare Classic with New Community-Driven Format
data.description: On March 24, 2026, a boutique healthcare advisory firm known as rule of three® (ro3) shared the revival of its yearly March Healthcare Classic. This event is a bracket-style tournament that pits the most significant trends in healthcare against each other to determine a winner.

data.title: Faye and Airia Forge Strategic Partnership to Accelerate Secure Enterprise AI Adoption
data.description: In Calabasas, California on March 24, 2026, Faye, a renowned company in the field of AI strategy, software implementation, and integration, has revealed a new partnership with Airia, the top enterprise AI orchestration and governance platform. This alliance marks a major expansion in the industry, with both companies bringing their expertise to the table.

data.title: Anti-Aging Protein Research Takes a Step Forward with Cell Cloning
data.description: A statement released for Avaí Bio, Inc. announced in Vancouver, BC on March 24, 2026 has revealed crucial findings. The protein α-Klotho, found in the bloodstream, plays a vital role in safeguarding various organs like the brain, heart, kidneys, and the immune system. Recent studies confirmed that increased levels of Klotho are associated with a decreased risk of ailments. The research, published in a peer-reviewed journal, highlights the significance of this protein in maintaining overall health.

data.title: myKaarma Receives Subaru Certification for Service Scheduling Platform
data.description: Certification has been provided to enhance modern appointment workflows, ensure operational consistency, and improve integrated retailer service performance in LONG BEACH, Calif. On March 24, 2026, myKaarma, a top-end provider of comprehensive service lane technology solutions, received recognition. This certification aims to boost efficiency and effectiveness, benefiting franchise auto businesses across the board.
There has been US "outreach" and Tehran "willing to listen" - CNN citing Iranian source.

data.title: First Student Brings Full-Service Fleet Management to Lafourche Parish School District
data.description: First Student, the leading student transportation services provider in North America, unveiled Fleet-as-a-Service, a program offering customizable solutions for districts' transportation requirements. The services include fleet maintenance, routing, and operations. The announcement was made in Cincinnati on March 24, 2026.

data.title: Piko Provisions Becomes WIC-Approved in Hawai'i, Expanding Access to Nutritious, Local Food for Families
data.description: A Hawaiian food company called Piko Provisions revealed that their products will be accessible for purchase through the Hawai'i Women, Infants, and Children (WIC) program starting on April 1, 2026. The WIC program is vital in assisting families in need.

data.title: WEATHER WINES CELEBRATES SPRING WITH SONOMA EPICUREAN PRESENTING SPONSORSHIP, NEW RELEASES, AND EXPANDED COMMUNITY PARTNERSHIPS
data.description: Weather Wines is celebrating the arrival of spring by unveiling their first-ever Carneros Gap releases and marking their fifth year as the presenting sponsor of the V Foundation Sonoma Epicurean event. The California-based winery, known for its high-quality Burgundian-varietal wines, launched the new Carneros Gap wines on March 24, 2026. The event will take place in Sonoma and will feature their latest releases. The V Foundation Sonoma Epicurean event, which Weather Wines has been sponsoring for five years now, is a significant gathering in the region's culinary and wine scene. This year, attendees can look forward to experiencing the new Carneros Gap collection, highlighting the winery's commitment to producing exceptional wines for wine enthusiasts.

data.title: Inlyte Energy Collaborates with Ervin Industries to Strengthen U.S. Battery Materials Supply Chain
data.description: In a recent development, Inlyte Energy has joined forces with Ervin, a well-established American manufacturer with over a century of experience, to enhance domestic energy storage supply chains. The collaboration aims to leverage Inlyte's advanced iron battery technology. This partnership, based in San Leandro, California, was announced on March 24, 2026. Inlyte Energy specializes in producing iron-sodium battery energy storage systems, contributing to the sustainable energy sector. This move signifies a strategic step towards fortifying the local energy storage industry.

data.title: PlanMember Announces Newest Financial Center in Leominster, MA
data.description: In Carpinteria, California on March 24, 2026, PlanMember revealed Welcome Financial in Leominster, MA as its latest independent PlanMember Financial Center. Nathan described Welcome Financial's foundation in family values, hospitality, and community trust.

data.title: Brightspeed Fiber Build Tops 90% in Tennessee, Completed in 13 Communities
data.description: Brightspeed, the third-largest fiber broadband provider in the nation, is currently sending their company representatives to assist residents in connecting to the fastest internet service available in the country. Their efforts include going door to door in CHARLOTTE, N.C. to enable families and businesses to access multi-gig-speed internet. This initiative is part of Brightspeed's commitment to empowering users with cutting-edge connectivity options. The project started on March 24, 2026, and has already seen significant success in increasing internet speed for households and commercial entities in the area.

data.title: Lumos Launches Identity Security Agents that Turn Intelligence into Enhanced Security Posture at Scale
data.description: A new identity platform has been introduced that integrates visibility and intelligence to enable active responses, empowering identity teams to transform identity risk into tangible outcomes. This platform, named Lumos, is the initial Autonomous Identity platform of its kind. The announcement was made on March 24, 2026, with operations being carried out in both San Francisco and New York.

data.title: Cyberhaven Closes the AI Security Gap Amid the Meteoric Rise of Agentic AI
data.description: Cyberhaven, a leading AI-native data security company based in Mountain View, California, revealed the introduction of Agentic AI Security on March 24, 2026. The new security solution aims to tackle the primary blind spot in enterprise AI governance, catering to the fast-paced nature of the industry. This move signifies Cyberhaven's commitment to providing innovative cybersecurity solutions in an evolving digital landscape.

data.title: Mesirow's Gary Pattengale Shares Key Tax Season Planning Considerations on WGN Radio
data.description: Gary Pattengale, a Wealth Advisor and Advanced Planning Specialist at Mesirow, recently provided tax-season planning advice on WGN Radio as the April 15 filing deadline approaches. During the discussion, he highlighted important topics such as the significance of filing timing and extensions, changes in State and Local Tax deductions, the benefits of Health Savings Accounts (HSAs), deductions for vehicle interest, and the advantages of utilizing 529 plans for educational expenses. This insightful discussion was a great resource for individuals looking to navigate the complexities of tax season.

data.title: Sustainable Packaging Market Size to Surpass USD 476 Billion by 2032, Shows New Maximize Market Research Analysis
data.description: In Pune, India, on March 24, 2026, the Sustainable Packaging Market Global Outlook report from Maximize Market Research covers trends from 2025 to 2032. The report includes insights on emerging materials, regional adoption trends, and corporate strategies. Key information about the global sustainable packaging industry is outlined in the report, providing a comprehensive overview of the market landscape.
